findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_supplier_detail" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Get the complete profile of a single Chinese apparel supplier by ID. PREREQUISITE: You MUST first call search_suppliers or recommend_suppliers to obtain a valid…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
